questionHtml: Suggest the relationship that points A, B and C show between the concentration of the acid and the rate of reaction.
markschemeHtml:
«directly» proportional

 

Accept “first order” or “linear”.

Do not accept “rate increases as concentration increases” or “positive correlation”

[1 mark]
